TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_Yuli, title = Yuli, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/Yuli} }

S.FORM: == Yuli == Yuli a sakuwan ku Hualien. kumud nu kalesakan, 210.89 km¬≤. (kalesakan nu linpanti 62.21 km¬≤, kalesakan nu pawliwti 14.21 km¬≤), u kasabinawlan, 12,299 ku tademaw. u kasalumaluma' sa, 4,458 ku luma'. ilabu nu kasaniyazu' nu siyang sa, 6,346 ku ingcumin a tademaw. u kasabinawlan, Pakalatu 52%(Pangcah) ku kasabinawlan. u tademaw ilabu nu siyang u paylang ku alumanay. nikasakuwakuwan Yuli mala 15 a cuwen atu 20 ku niyazu'. kina 20 a niyazu'sa, Angcoh , Afih , Harawan , Lingacay , Ceroh , Patawlinan , Makotaay , Sedeng , Tokar , Lohok , Posko , Silangkong , Cihakay , Cilakesay , Cinemnemay , Takay , Satefo , Namisan , Matadim , Mangcelan . Posko ÁéČťáĆťéģ(ťėŅÁĺéŤ™ě:PoskoÔľõŤáļÁĀ£ŚģĘŚģ∂Ť™ěśĶ∑ťôłŤÖĒ:Ngiugňč liňč zhinňäÔľõśó•Ť™ě:ÁéČťáĆÔľŹNgiugňč liňč zhin .ťĚĘÁ©ćÁīĄ252km¬≤,ÁāļŚÖ®ŚúčťĚĘÁ©ćśúÄŚ§ßÁöĄťéģ . Posko a kenis " A-misa a kamu Posko, Taywan Ngayngay a kamu u tukus a ngiha, Ngiug' li' zhin', Lipun a kamu, Posko/Ngiug' li'zhin' tini i Taywan Kalingku akuwan nu satimulan, nuwamisan belaw u Kuhkuh a kenis, sawalian belaw u Bakung, Pusung akuwan Kakacawan a kenis, satipan belaw u Takkei a kenis, nutimilan mitules tu Kungpu a kenis, nu Kalingku akuwan nutimulan kasaupuan a kakitizaan, nu Taywan sawalian hekal a kasaupu, nu Kalingku a kenis "pasu Yuy-sin a tuse" atu Pusung a kenisan u satabakiay a kenis. u hekal pakala tu 252km¬≤, u hamin nu kanatal u satabakiay hekal a kenis "u adidi'ay nu Taypakay a tuse tu 271 pin-bang kung-li." zayhan tini i Kalingku Pusung tu teban a zazan, mayza i nutimilan izaw ku yi-cang a zazan sakatayza tini i sadipasan a buyu' u zumaay i Kakacawan a kenis pabesut ku saculilan. tini a kenis a kakitizaan i pabaw masaenalay nu Kalingku Pusung a helung, satipan izaw ku Cung-yang a buyu', micangzay tu sadipasan a buyu', izaw ku Siw-ku-lang a sauwac atu zuma a sauwac nu Kuluhaci a sauwac, Takkei a sauwac, Lukulaku a sauwac "Lele a sauwac", Cin-suy a sauwac a malikidl. laylay Pusku a kenis malumanay a ngangan "Pusku", lalekalan a kamu caay ka lecad, sakacacay a kamu nu Bunun a ngihah, imi u cangbul sa, zayhan Siw-ku-lang a sauwac pabesut i labu, u tenes caay kauded makelah tu ku sauwac, beliwan nu bali u liken lala' matahpu tu ku tapuku, sakatusa a kamu makay nu A-mis a kamu "paypayke" a ngiha "butul" han nu a-mis u paypayke, uyni tiniay a langaw tu butul a sungangan, sakatulu a kamu 1875 a mihcaan Taywan a kenis sakakaay mikeliday tu hitay ci U-kuwng-liyang milakuit tu Cung-yang buyu' katukuh i Pusku i bukelalay a hitay, pakazih tu Siw-ku-lang a sauwacan matumes nu salenga'cay a ba'tu " ta-li-s", uynian a ta-li-s mahiza u caay henay ka kidisen "Pu" malikatay a "ba'tu", u hitay itini patizeng aca tu "ke" a luma' zazan, pangangan han "Pusku". uynian a kenis nau yincumin A-mis atu Bunun kalalacayan a kakitizaan. 1829 a mihcaan, Bung-san akuwan izaw ku Makataw a binacadan a tademaw mabulaw tayza i Pusung enal, naka kaian nu Puyuma, i 1836 a mihcaan miduduc tu Sin-u-li a sauwac malingatu a mabulaw, sazikuzay i nu ayzaay a Lakulaku a sauwac satimulan nu masacebalay tu masaupuay, satu Siw-ku-lang a sauwac tu satipan a Cang-liyang-lian patizeng tu niyazu', mala u tabakiay a niyazu'. saayaway a patadas, hinien uyza u mikeliday tu katalalan, pabuy a micumud tu buyu', a misungaay tu Bunun, atu miliyun tu tipus. nika uyniay a kakitizaan hina balat, sautangay i 1845 a mihcaan, niyazu' malimad aca tayza i nuwalian nu Siw-ku-lang a sauwac u tabakiay tu a niyazu' "ayzaay a Kungpu a kenis Tung-li a niyazu'", Cang-lyang u tabakiay a niyazu' pasumad han tu malimanay a niyazu'. satu u Bung-san akuwan, Taywan akuwan tu Makataw a binacadan, Ta-u-lung a binacadan atu Si-la-ya a binacadan kakilulkilul sa makay sawalian tayni, tulin tu ayzaay a Pusku, Kungpu, Fanaw, Lilung a kenisan patizeng tu niyazu', 1879 a mihcaan hawsa, "Taywan bacu'" a cudadan, uyzian a kasiniyazu' pangangan han tu Pu-se-ke waluay a pibetikan nu Pin-pu a binacadan. malanel i Pusku Pinpu a yincumin hatu nu Ta-u lung a binacadan. duduc ci Cen-ingan "Pusung" nisulitan a cudad, 1850 a ziday Pusung izaw tu ku Layak micumun mananel, atu yincumin mikawaw tu patumaliway, nika uynian a kenis saahebal sa ku nipalahad, katukuh 1850 a mihcaan malilid nu "Pa-tung sumamaday a zazan" napatadas hawsa kalamkam satu malahad. pikuwanan henay nu Lipunan a ziday tungusay nu Pusung a sakuwan Pusku a sakuwan Pusku a kakitizaan, zikuzay pasumad han tu Kalingku a sakuwan Puske a sakuwan, 1917 amihcaan Kalingku pusung a zazan silamalay a zazan muculil katukuh tini, milala tu uyaanan tu a ba'tu, u caay henay ka kidis a "malikatay a ba'tu a imi, uynian a kakitizaan pasumad tu ngangan "Pusku" han, "Tamasatu". 1920 a mihcaan mipazang tu Pusku a niyazu', 1937 a mihcaan macakat "Pusku zazan" han, pakeni nu Kalingku a kuwan Pusku a kenis, zikuza nu ngangayaw 1946 a mihcaan " min-kou 35 a mihcaan Pusku a zazan pasumad han Pusku kenis, makakenis palasit tu 23 a kasasiniyazu'. 1971 a mihcaan tu"min-kou enem a bataan a mihcaan", kenis han pakilac imahiniaya tu saba lima a niyazu'. i Siw-ku-lan a sauwacan izaw ku cacay salengacay a ba'tu, uya sauwac anu mabuwah tu caay ka lenem atu malikid, tiniay Pusku a tademaw piazih tuynian a Pus u "kasatiman a kenis"han, satu i min-kou 59 a mihcaan sabaw tusa a bulad simiubiay miala tu nu kenis a kasaetiman, makay piazih nu kenis a binawlan, caay ka tenes makings tu nu taylin ku niubian a tuud, uynian ni ubian a tuud macikcik tu pinaay tu a ba'tu, ayza pazang hatu i Pusku adidi'ay a cacudadan tapiingan nu pilatlatan', Pusku a kenis patizeng tu aazihan tu cudad, Pusku pisaupuan nu babalaki tapiingan nu putah. tademaw Pusku kenis a tademaw u katuud nu tademaw 93/ km¬≤ dada', i hamin nu kanatal ka katuud nu tademaw nipasilutan u saadidiay' uyza dada' katalakawan tu Cingaluan a kenis. caculilan sakay nu likutay a caculilan izaw ku nutimulan silamalay a zazan, basu a zazan, izaw ku Tay siwa a zazan, lete basu a zazan 193 akuwa a zazan atu I-Cang a zazan Tay tulu a bataan a zazan mibesul tu wali sadipasan a buyu', nuwalian Taywan caculilan yadah ku kakayzaan miculu'. lalayan tuud a piidangan uyni a kenis nai' ku uning nu mukinay misangaay a sakakawawan, satu mahizatu landaw ku lutuk tingalaw ku nanum atu kapah ku bali, paymihcaan mililid tu katuuday miidangay a labang tayni miidang. u Angcuh ungsing nu Kalingku saka waluay cacay hekal a azihan, lalayan a nanum siniala tu liwhuwng a sanek, u liwliw salungan singangan i kitakit, i capi izaw ku kilangkilangan tu saculil, uzuma izaw aca baluhay nisanga'an tu Lung-bung pipalumaan pipahabayan a kakitizaan palahad tu lasubu a mihcaan nu maikesay a kilang patatungus tu aidangan. uzuma izaw henay nu Pusku pikacawan tu kazizeng katukuh i Tungli malumanay pikacawan tu basu malumanay nu silamalay a zazan nu pabatikalan a zazan, Pusku a ngayngay pawapenan tu sakauzip tu canancanan a tuudan, puske a yincumin piazihan pipacakayan, I-san kanatal a aidangan nanan kasaupuan nu miidangay a labang, Pa-tung-kuwn kasumamadan a zazan pikayakayan a zazan labuay mikilim tu kaliyuhan,Ce-ke a buyu' cincen a balu salungan azihen, Siw-ku-lan a sauwac mikinaul tu talastas a ayam atu nuwalian mulikatay a ba'tu miazih u siacaay aidangan.
S.PHON: == jur~…ĺi == jur~…ĺi a sakuwan ku ńßuar~…ĺi…ôn. kumud nu kar~…ĺ…ôsakan, ***.** km*. (kar~…ĺ…ôsakan nu r~…ĺinpanti **.** km*, kar~…ĺ…ôsakan nu pawr~…ĺiwti **.** km*), u kasabinawr~…ĺan, **,*** ku tad…ômaw. u kasar~…ĺumar~…ĺuma Ē~ ° sa, *,*** ku r~…ĺuma Ē~ °. ir~…ĺabu nu kasanijazu Ē~ ° nu sijaŇč sa, *,*** ku iŇč ¶umin a tad…ômaw. u kasabinawr~…ĺan, pakar~…ĺatu **%(paŇč ¶ańß) ku kasabinawr~…ĺan. u tad…ômaw ir~…ĺabu nu sijaŇč u pajr~…ĺaŇč ku ar~…ĺumanaj. nikasakuwakuwan jur~…ĺi mar~…ĺa ** a ¶uw…ôn atu ** ku nijazu Ē~ °. kina ** a nijazu Ē~ °sa, aŇč ¶ońß , afińß , ńßarawan , r~…ĺiŇča ¶aj , ¶…ôrońß , patawr~…ĺinan , makotaaj , s…ôd…ôŇč , tokar , r~…ĺońßok , posko , sir~…ĺaŇčkoŇč , ¶ińßakaj , ¶ir~…ĺak…ôsaj , ¶in…ômn…ômaj , takaj , sat…ôfo , namisan , matadim , maŇč ¶…ôr~…ĺan . posko ***(***:posko*********:Ňčiug* r~…ĺi* zńßin****:***Ňčiug* r~…ĺi* zńßin .******km*,********* . posko a k…ônis " a-misa a kamu posko, tajwan ŇčajŇčaj a kamu u tukus a Ňčińßa, Ňčiug Ē~ ° r~…ĺi Ē~ ° zńßin Ē~ °, r~…ĺipun a kamu, posko/Ňčiug Ē~ ° r~…ĺi Ē~ °zńßin Ē~ ° tini i tajwan kar~…ĺiŇčku akuwan nu satimur~…ĺan, nuwamisan b…ôr~…ĺaw u kuńßkuńß a k…ônis, sawar~…ĺian b…ôr~…ĺaw u bakuŇč, pusuŇč akuwan kaka ¶awan a k…ônis, satipan b…ôr~…ĺaw u takk…ôi a k…ônis, nutimir~…ĺan mitur~…ĺ…ôs tu kuŇčpu a k…ônis, nu kar~…ĺiŇčku akuwan nutimur~…ĺan kasaupuan a kakitizaan, nu tajwan sawar~…ĺian ńß…ôkar~…ĺ a kasaupu, nu kar~…ĺiŇčku a k…ônis "pasu juj-sin a tus…ô" atu pusuŇč a k…ônisan u satabakiaj a k…ônis. u ńß…ôkar~…ĺ pakar~…ĺa tu ***km*, u ńßamin nu kanatar~…ĺ u satabakiaj ńß…ôkar~…ĺ a k…ônis "u adidi Ē~ °aj nu tajpakaj a tus…ô tu *** pin-baŇč kuŇč-r~…ĺi." zajńßan tini i kar~…ĺiŇčku pusuŇč tu t…ôban a zazan, majza i nutimir~…ĺan izaw ku ji- ¶aŇč a zazan sakatajza tini i sadipasan a buju Ē~ ° u zumaaj i kaka ¶awan a k…ônis pab…ôsut ku sa ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺan. tini a k…ônis a kakitizaan i pabaw masa…ônar~…ĺaj nu kar~…ĺiŇčku pusuŇč a ńß…ôr~…ĺuŇč, satipan izaw ku ¶uŇč-jaŇč a buju Ē~ °, mi ¶aŇčzaj tu sadipasan a buju Ē~ °, izaw ku siw-ku-r~…ĺaŇč a sauwa ¶ atu zuma a sauwa ¶ nu kur~…ĺuńßa ¶i a sauwa ¶, takk…ôi a sauwa ¶, r~…ĺukur~…ĺaku a sauwa ¶ "r~…ĺ…ôr~…ĺ…ô a sauwa ¶", ¶in-suj a sauwa ¶ a mar~…ĺikidr~…ĺ. r~…ĺajr~…ĺaj pusku a k…ônis mar~…ĺumanaj a ŇčaŇčan "pusku", r~…ĺar~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺan a kamu ¶aaj ka r~…ĺ…ô ¶ad, saka ¶a ¶aj a kamu nu bunun a Ňčińßańß, imi u ¶aŇčbur~…ĺ sa, zajńßan siw-ku-r~…ĺaŇč a sauwa ¶ pab…ôsut i r~…ĺabu, u t…ôn…ôs ¶aaj kaud…ôd mak…ôr~…ĺańß tu ku sauwa ¶, b…ôr~…ĺiwan nu bar~…ĺi u r~…ĺik…ôn r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° matańßpu tu ku tapuku, sakatusa a kamu makaj nu a-mis a kamu "pajpajk…ô" a Ňčińßa "butur~…ĺ" ńßan nu a-mis u pajpajk…ô, ujni tiniaj a r~…ĺaŇčaw tu butur~…ĺ a suŇčaŇčan, sakatur~…ĺu a kamu **** a mińß ¶aan tajwan a k…ônis sakakaaj mik…ôr~…ĺidaj tu ńßitaj ¶i u-kuwŇč-r~…ĺijaŇč mir~…ĺakuit tu ¶uŇč-jaŇč buju Ē~ ° katukuńß i pusku i buk…ôr~…ĺar~…ĺaj a ńßitaj, pakazińß tu siw-ku-r~…ĺaŇč a sauwa ¶an matum…ôs nu sar~…ĺ…ôŇča Ē~ ° ¶aj a ba Ē~ °tu " ta-r~…ĺi-s", ujnian a ta-r~…ĺi-s mańßiza u ¶aaj ńß…ônaj ka kidis…ôn "pu" mar~…ĺikataj a "ba Ē~ °tu", u ńßitaj itini patiz…ôŇč a ¶a tu "k…ô" a r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° zazan, paŇčaŇčan ńßan "pusku". ujnian a k…ônis nau jin ¶umin a-mis atu bunun kar~…ĺar~…ĺa ¶ajan a kakitizaan. **** a mińß ¶aan, buŇč-san akuwan izaw ku makataw a bina ¶adan a tad…ômaw mabur~…ĺaw tajza i pusuŇč …ônar~…ĺ, naka kaian nu pujuma, i **** a mińß ¶aan midudu ¶ tu sin-u-r~…ĺi a sauwa ¶ mar~…ĺiŇčatu a mabur~…ĺaw, sazikuzaj i nu ajzaaj a r~…ĺakur~…ĺaku a sauwa ¶ satimur~…ĺan nu masa ¶…ôbar~…ĺaj tu masaupuaj, satu siw-ku-r~…ĺaŇč a sauwa ¶ tu satipan a ¶aŇč-r~…ĺijaŇč-r~…ĺian patiz…ôŇč tu nijazu Ē~ °, mar~…ĺa u tabakiaj a nijazu Ē~ °. saajawaj a patadas, ńßini…ôn ujza u mik…ôr~…ĺidaj tu katar~…ĺar~…ĺan, pabuj a mi ¶umud tu buju Ē~ °, a misuŇčaaj tu bunun, atu mir~…ĺijun tu tipus. nika ujniaj a kakitizaan ńßina bar~…ĺat, sautaŇčaj i **** a mińß ¶aan, nijazu Ē~ ° mar~…ĺimad a ¶a tajza i nuwar~…ĺian nu siw-ku-r~…ĺaŇč a sauwa ¶ u tabakiaj tu a nijazu Ē~ ° "ajzaaj a kuŇčpu a k…ônis tuŇč-r~…ĺi a nijazu Ē~ °", ¶aŇč-r~…ĺjaŇč u tabakiaj a nijazu Ē~ ° pasumad ńßan tu mar~…ĺimanaj a nijazu Ē~ °. satu u buŇč-san akuwan, tajwan akuwan tu makataw a bina ¶adan, ta-u-r~…ĺuŇč a bina ¶adan atu si-r~…ĺa-ja a bina ¶adan kakir~…ĺur~…ĺkir~…ĺur~…ĺ sa makaj sawar~…ĺian tajni, tur~…ĺin tu ajzaaj a pusku, kuŇčpu, fanaw, r~…ĺir~…ĺuŇč a k…ônisan patiz…ôŇč tu nijazu Ē~ °, **** a mińß ¶aan ńßawsa, "tajwan ba ¶u Ē~ °" a ¶udadan, ujzian a kasinijazu Ē~ ° paŇčaŇčan ńßan tu pu-s…ô-k…ô war~…ĺuaj a pib…ôtikan nu pin-pu a bina ¶adan. mar~…ĺan…ôr~…ĺ i pusku pinpu a jin ¶umin ńßatu nu ta-u r~…ĺuŇč a bina ¶adan. dudu ¶ ¶i ¶…ôn-iŇčan "pusuŇč" nisur~…ĺitan a ¶udad, **** a zidaj pusuŇč izaw tu ku r~…ĺajak mi ¶umun manan…ôr~…ĺ, atu jin ¶umin mikawaw tu patumar~…ĺiwaj, nika ujnian a k…ônis saańß…ôbar~…ĺ sa ku nipar~…ĺańßad, katukuńß **** a mińß ¶aan mar~…ĺir~…ĺid nu "pa-tuŇč sumamadaj a zazan" napatadas ńßawsa kar~…ĺamkam satu mar~…ĺańßad. pikuwanan ńß…ônaj nu r~…ĺipunan a zidaj tuŇčusaj nu pusuŇč a sakuwan pusku a sakuwan pusku a kakitizaan, zikuzaj pasumad ńßan tu kar~…ĺiŇčku a sakuwan pusk…ô a sakuwan, **** amińß ¶aan kar~…ĺiŇčku pusuŇč a zazan sir~…ĺamar~…ĺaj a zazan mu ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ katukuńß tini, mir~…ĺar~…ĺa tu ujaanan tu a ba Ē~ °tu, u ¶aaj ńß…ônaj ka kidis a "mar~…ĺikataj a ba Ē~ °tu a imi, ujnian a kakitizaan pasumad tu ŇčaŇčan "pusku" ńßan, "tamasatu". **** a mińß ¶aan mipazaŇč tu pusku a nijazu Ē~ °, **** a mińß ¶aan ma ¶akat "pusku zazan" ńßan, pak…ôni nu kar~…ĺiŇčku a kuwan pusku a k…ônis, zikuza nu ŇčaŇčajaw **** a mińß ¶aan " min-kou ** a mińß ¶aan pusku a zazan pasumad ńßan pusku k…ônis, makak…ônis par~…ĺasit tu ** a kasasinijazu Ē~ °. **** a mińß ¶aan tu"min-kou …ôn…ôm a bataan a mińß ¶aan", k…ônis ńßan pakir~…ĺa ¶ imańßiniaja tu saba r~…ĺima a nijazu Ē~ °. i siw-ku-r~…ĺan a sauwa ¶an izaw ku ¶a ¶aj sar~…ĺ…ôŇča ¶aj a ba Ē~ °tu, uja sauwa ¶ anu mabuwańß tu ¶aaj ka r~…ĺ…ôn…ôm atu mar~…ĺikid, tiniaj pusku a tad…ômaw piazińß tujnian a pus u "kasatiman a k…ônis"ńßan, satu i min-kou ** a mińß ¶aan sabaw tusa a bur~…ĺad simiubiaj miar~…ĺa tu nu k…ônis a kasa…ôtiman, makaj piazińß nu k…ônis a binawr~…ĺan, ¶aaj ka t…ôn…ôs makiŇčs tu nu tajr~…ĺin ku niubian a tuud, ujnian ni ubian a tuud ma ¶ik ¶ik tu pinaaj tu a ba Ē~ °tu, ajza pazaŇč ńßatu i pusku adidi Ē~ °aj a ¶a ¶udadan tapiiŇčan nu pir~…ĺatr~…ĺatan Ē~ °, pusku a k…ônis patiz…ôŇč tu aazińßan tu ¶udad, pusku pisaupuan nu babar~…ĺaki tapiiŇčan nu putańß. tad…ômaw pusku k…ônis a tad…ômaw u katuud nu tad…ômaw **/ km* dada Ē~ °, i ńßamin nu kanatar~…ĺ ka katuud nu tad…ômaw nipasir~…ĺutan u saadidiaj Ē~ ° ujza dada Ē~ ° katar~…ĺakawan tu ¶iŇčar~…ĺuan a k…ônis. ¶a ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺan sakaj nu r~…ĺikutaj a ¶a ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺan izaw ku nutimur~…ĺan sir~…ĺamar~…ĺaj a zazan, basu a zazan, izaw ku taj siwa a zazan, r~…ĺ…ôt…ô basu a zazan *** akuwa a zazan atu i- ¶aŇč a zazan taj tur~…ĺu a bataan a zazan mib…ôsur~…ĺ tu war~…ĺi sadipasan a buju Ē~ °, nuwar~…ĺian tajwan ¶a ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺan jadańß ku kakajzaan mi ¶ur~…ĺu Ē~ °. r~…ĺar~…ĺajan tuud a piidaŇčan ujni a k…ônis nai Ē~ ° ku uniŇč nu mukinaj misaŇčaaj a sakakawawan, satu mańßizatu r~…ĺandaw ku r~…ĺutuk tiŇčar~…ĺaw ku nanum atu kapańß ku bar~…ĺi, pajmińß ¶aan mir~…ĺir~…ĺid tu katuudaj miidaŇčaj a r~…ĺabaŇč tajni miidaŇč. u aŇč ¶uńß uŇčsiŇč nu kar~…ĺiŇčku saka war~…ĺuaj ¶a ¶aj ńß…ôkar~…ĺ a azińßan, r~…ĺar~…ĺajan a nanum siniar~…ĺa tu r~…ĺiwńßuwŇč a san…ôk, u r~…ĺiwr~…ĺiw sar~…ĺuŇčan siŇčaŇčan i kitakit, i ¶api izaw ku kir~…ĺaŇčkir~…ĺaŇčan tu sa ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ, uzuma izaw a ¶a bar~…ĺuńßaj nisaŇča Ē~ °an tu r~…ĺuŇč-buŇč pipar~…ĺumaan pipańßabajan a kakitizaan par~…ĺańßad tu r~…ĺasubu a mińß ¶aan nu maik…ôsaj a kir~…ĺaŇč patatuŇčus tu aidaŇčan. uzuma izaw ńß…ônaj nu pusku pika ¶awan tu kaziz…ôŇč katukuńß i tuŇčr~…ĺi mar~…ĺumanaj pika ¶awan tu basu mar~…ĺumanaj nu sir~…ĺamar~…ĺaj a zazan nu pabatikar~…ĺan a zazan, pusku a ŇčajŇčaj pawap…ônan tu sakauzip tu ¶anan ¶anan a tuudan, pusk…ô a jin ¶umin piazińßan pipa ¶akajan, i-san kanatar~…ĺ a aidaŇčan nanan kasaupuan nu miidaŇčaj a r~…ĺabaŇč, pa-tuŇč-kuwn kasumamadan a zazan pikajakajan a zazan r~…ĺabuaj mikir~…ĺim tu kar~…ĺijuńßan, ¶…ô-k…ô a buju Ē~ ° ¶in ¶…ôn a bar~…ĺu sar~…ĺuŇčan azińß…ôn, siw-ku-r~…ĺan a sauwa ¶ mikinaur~…ĺ tu tar~…ĺastas a ajam atu nuwar~…ĺian mur~…ĺikataj a ba Ē~ °tu miazińß u sia ¶aaj aidaŇčan.
S.FORM: == Yuli == Yuli a sakuwan ku Hualien. kumud nu kalesakan, 210.89 km¬≤. (kalesakan nu linpanti 62.21 km¬≤, kalesakan nu pawliwti 14.21 km¬≤), u kasabinawlan, 12,299 ku tademaw. u kasalumaluma' sa, 4,458 ku luma'. ilabu nu kasaniyazu' nu siyang sa, 6,346 ku ingcumin a tademaw. u kasabinawlan, Pakalatu 52%(Pangcah) ku kasabinawlan. u tademaw ilabu nu siyang u paylang ku alumanay. nikasakuwakuwan Yuli mala 15 a cuwen atu 20 ku niyazu'. kina 20 a niyazu'sa, Angcoh , Afih , Harawan , Lingacay , Ceroh , Patawlinan , Makotaay , Sedeng , Tokar , Lohok , Posko , Silangkong , Cihakay , Cilakesay , Cinemnemay , Takay , Satefo , Namisan , Matadim , Mangcelan . Posko ÁéČťáĆťéģ(ťėŅÁĺéŤ™ě:PoskoÔľõŤáļÁĀ£ŚģĘŚģ∂Ť™ěśĶ∑ťôłŤÖĒ:Ngiugňč liňč zhinňäÔľõśó•Ť™ě:ÁéČťáĆÔľŹNgiugňč liňč zhin .ťĚĘÁ©ćÁīĄ252km¬≤,ÁāļŚÖ®ŚúčťĚĘÁ©ćśúÄŚ§ßÁöĄťéģ . Posko a kenis " A-misa a kamu Posko, Taywan Ngayngay a kamu u tukus a ngiha, Ngiug' li' zhin', Lipun a kamu, Posko/Ngiug' li'zhin' tini i Taywan Kalingku akuwan nu satimulan, nuwamisan belaw u Kuhkuh a kenis, sawalian belaw u Bakung, Pusung akuwan Kakacawan a kenis, satipan belaw u Takkei a kenis, nutimilan mitules tu Kungpu a kenis, nu Kalingku akuwan nutimulan kasaupuan a kakitizaan, nu Taywan sawalian hekal a kasaupu, nu Kalingku a kenis "pasu Yuy-sin a tuse" atu Pusung a kenisan u satabakiay a kenis. u hekal pakala tu 252km¬≤, u hamin nu kanatal u satabakiay hekal a kenis "u adidi'ay nu Taypakay a tuse tu 271 pin-bang kung-li." zayhan tini i Kalingku Pusung tu teban a zazan, mayza i nutimilan izaw ku yi-cang a zazan sakatayza tini i sadipasan a buyu' u zumaay i Kakacawan a kenis pabesut ku saculilan. tini a kenis a kakitizaan i pabaw masaenalay nu Kalingku Pusung a helung, satipan izaw ku Cung-yang a buyu', micangzay tu sadipasan a buyu', izaw ku Siw-ku-lang a sauwac atu zuma a sauwac nu Kuluhaci a sauwac, Takkei a sauwac, Lukulaku a sauwac "Lele a sauwac", Cin-suy a sauwac a malikidl. laylay Pusku a kenis malumanay a ngangan "Pusku", lalekalan a kamu caay ka lecad, sakacacay a kamu nu Bunun a ngihah, imi u cangbul sa, zayhan Siw-ku-lang a sauwac pabesut i labu, u tenes caay kauded makelah tu ku sauwac, beliwan nu bali u liken lala' matahpu tu ku tapuku, sakatusa a kamu makay nu A-mis a kamu "paypayke" a ngiha "butul" han nu a-mis u paypayke, uyni tiniay a langaw tu butul a sungangan, sakatulu a kamu 1875 a mihcaan Taywan a kenis sakakaay mikeliday tu hitay ci U-kuwng-liyang milakuit tu Cung-yang buyu' katukuh i Pusku i bukelalay a hitay, pakazih tu Siw-ku-lang a sauwacan matumes nu salenga'cay a ba'tu " ta-li-s", uynian a ta-li-s mahiza u caay henay ka kidisen "Pu" malikatay a "ba'tu", u hitay itini patizeng aca tu "ke" a luma' zazan, pangangan han "Pusku". uynian a kenis nau yincumin A-mis atu Bunun kalalacayan a kakitizaan. 1829 a mihcaan, Bung-san akuwan izaw ku Makataw a binacadan a tademaw mabulaw tayza i Pusung enal, naka kaian nu Puyuma, i 1836 a mihcaan miduduc tu Sin-u-li a sauwac malingatu a mabulaw, sazikuzay i nu ayzaay a Lakulaku a sauwac satimulan nu masacebalay tu masaupuay, satu Siw-ku-lang a sauwac tu satipan a Cang-liyang-lian patizeng tu niyazu', mala u tabakiay a niyazu'. saayaway a patadas, hinien uyza u mikeliday tu katalalan, pabuy a micumud tu buyu', a misungaay tu Bunun, atu miliyun tu tipus. nika uyniay a kakitizaan hina balat, sautangay i 1845 a mihcaan, niyazu' malimad aca tayza i nuwalian nu Siw-ku-lang a sauwac u tabakiay tu a niyazu' "ayzaay a Kungpu a kenis Tung-li a niyazu'", Cang-lyang u tabakiay a niyazu' pasumad han tu malimanay a niyazu'. satu u Bung-san akuwan, Taywan akuwan tu Makataw a binacadan, Ta-u-lung a binacadan atu Si-la-ya a binacadan kakilulkilul sa makay sawalian tayni, tulin tu ayzaay a Pusku, Kungpu, Fanaw, Lilung a kenisan patizeng tu niyazu', 1879 a mihcaan hawsa, "Taywan bacu'" a cudadan, uyzian a kasiniyazu' pangangan han tu Pu-se-ke waluay a pibetikan nu Pin-pu a binacadan. malanel i Pusku Pinpu a yincumin hatu nu Ta-u lung a binacadan. duduc ci Cen-ingan "Pusung" nisulitan a cudad, 1850 a ziday Pusung izaw tu ku Layak micumun mananel, atu yincumin mikawaw tu patumaliway, nika uynian a kenis saahebal sa ku nipalahad, katukuh 1850 a mihcaan malilid nu "Pa-tung sumamaday a zazan" napatadas hawsa kalamkam satu malahad. pikuwanan henay nu Lipunan a ziday tungusay nu Pusung a sakuwan Pusku a sakuwan Pusku a kakitizaan, zikuzay pasumad han tu Kalingku a sakuwan Puske a sakuwan, 1917 amihcaan Kalingku pusung a zazan silamalay a zazan muculil katukuh tini, milala tu uyaanan tu a ba'tu, u caay henay ka kidis a "malikatay a ba'tu a imi, uynian a kakitizaan pasumad tu ngangan "Pusku" han, "Tamasatu". 1920 a mihcaan mipazang tu Pusku a niyazu', 1937 a mihcaan macakat "Pusku zazan" han, pakeni nu Kalingku a kuwan Pusku a kenis, zikuza nu ngangayaw 1946 a mihcaan " min-kou 35 a mihcaan Pusku a zazan pasumad han Pusku kenis, makakenis palasit tu 23 a kasasiniyazu'. 1971 a mihcaan tu"min-kou enem a bataan a mihcaan", kenis han pakilac imahiniaya tu saba lima a niyazu'. i Siw-ku-lan a sauwacan izaw ku cacay salengacay a ba'tu, uya sauwac anu mabuwah tu caay ka lenem atu malikid, tiniay Pusku a tademaw piazih tuynian a Pus u "kasatiman a kenis"han, satu i min-kou 59 a mihcaan sabaw tusa a bulad simiubiay miala tu nu kenis a kasaetiman, makay piazih nu kenis a binawlan, caay ka tenes makings tu nu taylin ku niubian a tuud, uynian ni ubian a tuud macikcik tu pinaay tu a ba'tu, ayza pazang hatu i Pusku adidi'ay a cacudadan tapiingan nu pilatlatan', Pusku a kenis patizeng tu aazihan tu cudad, Pusku pisaupuan nu babalaki tapiingan nu putah. tademaw Pusku kenis a tademaw u katuud nu tademaw 93/ km¬≤ dada', i hamin nu kanatal ka katuud nu tademaw nipasilutan u saadidiay' uyza dada' katalakawan tu Cingaluan a kenis. caculilan sakay nu likutay a caculilan izaw ku nutimulan silamalay a zazan, basu a zazan, izaw ku Tay siwa a zazan, lete basu a zazan 193 akuwa a zazan atu I-Cang a zazan Tay tulu a bataan a zazan mibesul tu wali sadipasan a buyu', nuwalian Taywan caculilan yadah ku kakayzaan miculu'. lalayan tuud a piidangan uyni a kenis nai' ku uning nu mukinay misangaay a sakakawawan, satu mahizatu landaw ku lutuk tingalaw ku nanum atu kapah ku bali, paymihcaan mililid tu katuuday miidangay a labang tayni miidang. u Angcuh ungsing nu Kalingku saka waluay cacay hekal a azihan, lalayan a nanum siniala tu liwhuwng a sanek, u liwliw salungan singangan i kitakit, i capi izaw ku kilangkilangan tu saculil, uzuma izaw aca baluhay nisanga'an tu Lung-bung pipalumaan pipahabayan a kakitizaan palahad tu lasubu a mihcaan nu maikesay a kilang patatungus tu aidangan. uzuma izaw henay nu Pusku pikacawan tu kazizeng katukuh i Tungli malumanay pikacawan tu basu malumanay nu silamalay a zazan nu pabatikalan a zazan, Pusku a ngayngay pawapenan tu sakauzip tu canancanan a tuudan, puske a yincumin piazihan pipacakayan, I-san kanatal a aidangan nanan kasaupuan nu miidangay a labang, Pa-tung-kuwn kasumamadan a zazan pikayakayan a zazan labuay mikilim tu kaliyuhan,Ce-ke a buyu' cincen a balu salungan azihen, Siw-ku-lan a sauwac mikinaul tu talastas a ayam atu nuwalian mulikatay a ba'tu miazih u siacaay aidangan.
S.PHON: == jur~…ĺi == jur~…ĺi a sakuwan ku ńßuar~…ĺi…ôn. kumud nu kar~…ĺ…ôsakan, ***.** km*. (kar~…ĺ…ôsakan nu r~…ĺinpanti **.** km*, kar~…ĺ…ôsakan nu pawr~…ĺiwti **.** km*), u kasabinawr~…ĺan, **,*** ku tad…ômaw. u kasar~…ĺumar~…ĺuma Ē~ ° sa, *,*** ku r~…ĺuma Ē~ °. ir~…ĺabu nu kasanijazu Ē~ ° nu sijaŇč sa, *,*** ku iŇč ¶umin a tad…ômaw. u kasabinawr~…ĺan, pakar~…ĺatu **%(paŇč ¶ańß) ku kasabinawr~…ĺan. u tad…ômaw ir~…ĺabu nu sijaŇč u pajr~…ĺaŇč ku ar~…ĺumanaj. nikasakuwakuwan jur~…ĺi mar~…ĺa ** a ¶uw…ôn atu ** ku nijazu Ē~ °. kina ** a nijazu Ē~ °sa, aŇč ¶ońß , afińß , ńßarawan , r~…ĺiŇča ¶aj , ¶…ôrońß , patawr~…ĺinan , makotaaj , s…ôd…ôŇč , tokar , r~…ĺońßok , posko , sir~…ĺaŇčkoŇč , ¶ińßakaj , ¶ir~…ĺak…ôsaj , ¶in…ômn…ômaj , takaj , sat…ôfo , namisan , matadim , maŇč ¶…ôr~…ĺan . posko ***(***:posko*********:Ňčiug* r~…ĺi* zńßin****:***Ňčiug* r~…ĺi* zńßin .******km*,********* . posko a k…ônis " a-misa a kamu posko, tajwan ŇčajŇčaj a kamu u tukus a Ňčińßa, Ňčiug Ē~ ° r~…ĺi Ē~ ° zńßin Ē~ °, r~…ĺipun a kamu, posko/Ňčiug Ē~ ° r~…ĺi Ē~ °zńßin Ē~ ° tini i tajwan kar~…ĺiŇčku akuwan nu satimur~…ĺan, nuwamisan b…ôr~…ĺaw u kuńßkuńß a k…ônis, sawar~…ĺian b…ôr~…ĺaw u bakuŇč, pusuŇč akuwan kaka ¶awan a k…ônis, satipan b…ôr~…ĺaw u takk…ôi a k…ônis, nutimir~…ĺan mitur~…ĺ…ôs tu kuŇčpu a k…ônis, nu kar~…ĺiŇčku akuwan nutimur~…ĺan kasaupuan a kakitizaan, nu tajwan sawar~…ĺian ńß…ôkar~…ĺ a kasaupu, nu kar~…ĺiŇčku a k…ônis "pasu juj-sin a tus…ô" atu pusuŇč a k…ônisan u satabakiaj a k…ônis. u ńß…ôkar~…ĺ pakar~…ĺa tu ***km*, u ńßamin nu kanatar~…ĺ u satabakiaj ńß…ôkar~…ĺ a k…ônis "u adidi Ē~ °aj nu tajpakaj a tus…ô tu *** pin-baŇč kuŇč-r~…ĺi." zajńßan tini i kar~…ĺiŇčku pusuŇč tu t…ôban a zazan, majza i nutimir~…ĺan izaw ku ji- ¶aŇč a zazan sakatajza tini i sadipasan a buju Ē~ ° u zumaaj i kaka ¶awan a k…ônis pab…ôsut ku sa ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺan. tini a k…ônis a kakitizaan i pabaw masa…ônar~…ĺaj nu kar~…ĺiŇčku pusuŇč a ńß…ôr~…ĺuŇč, satipan izaw ku ¶uŇč-jaŇč a buju Ē~ °, mi ¶aŇčzaj tu sadipasan a buju Ē~ °, izaw ku siw-ku-r~…ĺaŇč a sauwa ¶ atu zuma a sauwa ¶ nu kur~…ĺuńßa ¶i a sauwa ¶, takk…ôi a sauwa ¶, r~…ĺukur~…ĺaku a sauwa ¶ "r~…ĺ…ôr~…ĺ…ô a sauwa ¶", ¶in-suj a sauwa ¶ a mar~…ĺikidr~…ĺ. r~…ĺajr~…ĺaj pusku a k…ônis mar~…ĺumanaj a ŇčaŇčan "pusku", r~…ĺar~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺan a kamu ¶aaj ka r~…ĺ…ô ¶ad, saka ¶a ¶aj a kamu nu bunun a Ňčińßańß, imi u ¶aŇčbur~…ĺ sa, zajńßan siw-ku-r~…ĺaŇč a sauwa ¶ pab…ôsut i r~…ĺabu, u t…ôn…ôs ¶aaj kaud…ôd mak…ôr~…ĺańß tu ku sauwa ¶, b…ôr~…ĺiwan nu bar~…ĺi u r~…ĺik…ôn r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° matańßpu tu ku tapuku, sakatusa a kamu makaj nu a-mis a kamu "pajpajk…ô" a Ňčińßa "butur~…ĺ" ńßan nu a-mis u pajpajk…ô, pusku i buk…ôr~…ĺar~…ĺaj a ńßitaj, pakazińß tu siw-ku-r~…ĺaŇč a sauwa ¶an matum…ôs nu sar~…ĺ…ôŇča Ē~ ° ¶aj a ba Ē~ °tu " ta-r~…ĺi-s", ujnian a ta-r~…ĺi-s mańßiza u ¶aaj ńß…ônaj ka kidis…ôn "pu" nijazu Ē~ °", ¶aŇč-r~…ĺjaŇč u tabakiaj a nijazu Ē~ ° pasumad ńßan tu mar~…ĺimanaj a nijazu Ē~ °. satu u buŇč-san akuwan, tajwan akuwan tu makataw a bina ¶adan, ta-u-r~…ĺuŇč a bina ¶adan atu si-r~…ĺa-ja a bina ¶adan kakir~…ĺur~…ĺkir~…ĺur~…ĺ sa makaj sawar~…ĺian tajni, tur~…ĺin tu ajzaaj a pusku, kuŇčpu, fanaw, r~…ĺir~…ĺuŇč a k…ônisan patiz…ôŇč tu nijazu Ē~ °, **** a mińß ¶aan ńßawsa, "tajwan ba ¶u Ē~ °" a ¶udadan, ujzian a kasinijazu Ē~ ° paŇčaŇčan ńßan tu pu-s…ô-k…ô war~…ĺuaj a pib…ôtikan nu pin-pu a bina ¶adan. mar~…ĺan…ôr~…ĺ i pusku pinpu a jin ¶umin ńßatu nu ta-u r~…ĺuŇč a bina ¶adan. dudu ¶ ¶i ¶…ôn-iŇčan "pusuŇč" nisur~…ĺitan a ¶udad, **** a zidaj pusuŇč izaw tu ku r~…ĺajak mi ¶umun manan…ôr~…ĺ, atu jin ¶umin mikawaw tu patumar~…ĺiwaj, nika ujnian a k…ônis saańß…ôbar~…ĺ sa ku nipar~…ĺańßad, katukuńß **** a mińß ¶aan mar~…ĺir~…ĺid nu "pa-tuŇč sumamadaj a zazan" napatadas ńßawsa kar~…ĺamkam satu mar~…ĺańßad. pikuwanan ńß…ônaj nu r~…ĺipunan a zidaj tuŇčusaj nu pusuŇč a sakuwan pusku a sakuwan pusku a kakitizaan, zikuzaj pasumad ńßan tu kar~…ĺiŇčku a sakuwan pusk…ô a sakuwan, **** amińß ¶aan kar~…ĺiŇčku pusuŇč a zazan sir~…ĺamar~…ĺaj a zazan mu ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ katukuńß tini, mir~…ĺar~…ĺa tu ujaanan tu a ba Ē~ °tu, u ¶aaj ńß…ônaj ka kidis a "mar~…ĺikataj a ba Ē~ °tu a imi, ujnian a kakitizaan pasumad tu ŇčaŇčan "pusku" ńßan, "tamasatu". **** a pusku a zazan pasumad ńßan pusku k…ônis, makak…ônis par~…ĺasit tu ** a kasasinijazu Ē~ °. **** a mińß ¶aan tu"min-kou …ôn…ôm a bataan a mińß ¶aan", k…ônis ńßan pakir~…ĺa ¶ imańßiniaja tu saba r~…ĺima a nijazu Ē~ °. i siw-ku-r~…ĺan a sauwa ¶an izaw ku ¶a ¶aj sar~…ĺ…ôŇča ¶aj a ba Ē~ °tu, uja sauwa ¶ anu mabuwańß tu ¶aaj ka r~…ĺ…ôn…ôm atu mar~…ĺikid, tiniaj pusku a tad…ômaw piazińß tujnian a pus u "kasatiman a k…ônis"ńßan, satu i min-kou ** a mińß ¶aan sabaw tusa a bur~…ĺad simiubiaj miar~…ĺa tu nu k…ônis a kasa…ôtiman, makaj piazińß nu k…ônis a binawr~…ĺan, ¶aaj ka t…ôn…ôs makiŇčs tu nu tajr~…ĺin ku niubian a tuud, ujnian ni ubian a tuud ma ¶ik ¶ik tu pinaaj tu a ba Ē~ °tu, ajza pazaŇč ńßatu i pusku adidi Ē~ °aj a ¶a ¶udadan tapiiŇčan nu pir~…ĺatr~…ĺatan Ē~ °, pusku a k…ônis patiz…ôŇč tu aazińßan tu ¶udad, pusku pisaupuan nu babar~…ĺaki tapiiŇčan nu putańß. tad…ômaw pusku k…ônis a tad…ômaw u katuud nu tad…ômaw **/ km* dada Ē~ °, i ńßamin nu kanatar~…ĺ ka katuud nu tad…ômaw nipasir~…ĺutan u saadidiaj Ē~ ° ujza dada Ē~ ° katar~…ĺakawan tu ¶iŇčar~…ĺuan a k…ônis. ¶a ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺan sakaj nu r~…ĺikutaj a ¶a ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺan izaw ku nutimur~…ĺan sir~…ĺamar~…ĺaj a zazan, basu a zazan, izaw ku taj siwa a zazan, r~…ĺ…ôt…ô basu a zazan *** akuwa a zazan atu i- ¶aŇč a zazan taj tur~…ĺu a bataan a zazan mib…ôsur~…ĺ tu war~…ĺi sadipasan a buju Ē~ °, nuwar~…ĺian tajwan ¶a ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺan jadańß ku kakajzaan mi ¶ur~…ĺu Ē~ °. r~…ĺar~…ĺajan tuud a piidaŇčan ujni a k…ônis nai Ē~ ° ku uniŇč nu mukinaj misaŇčaaj a sakakawawan, satu mańßizatu r~…ĺandaw ku r~…ĺutuk tiŇčar~…ĺaw ku nanum atu kapańß ku bar~…ĺi, pajmińß ¶aan mir~…ĺir~…ĺid tu katuudaj miidaŇčaj a r~…ĺabaŇč tajni miidaŇč. u aŇč ¶uńß uŇčsiŇč nu kar~…ĺiŇčku saka war~…ĺuaj ¶a ¶aj ńß…ôkar~…ĺ a azińßan, r~…ĺar~…ĺajan a nanum siniar~…ĺa tu r~…ĺiwńßuwŇč a san…ôk, u r~…ĺiwr~…ĺiw sar~…ĺuŇčan siŇčaŇčan i kitakit, i ¶api izaw ku kir~…ĺaŇčkir~…ĺaŇčan tu sa ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ, uzuma izaw a ¶a bar~…ĺuńßaj nisaŇča Ē~ °an tu r~…ĺuŇč-buŇč pipar~…ĺumaan pipańßabajan a kakitizaan par~…ĺańßad tu r~…ĺasubu a mińß ¶aan nu maik…ôsaj a kir~…ĺaŇč patatuŇčus tu aidaŇčan. uzuma izaw ńß…ônaj nu pusku pika ¶awan tu kaziz…ôŇč katukuńß i tuŇčr~…ĺi mar~…ĺumanaj pika ¶awan tu basu mar~…ĺumanaj nu sir~…ĺamar~…ĺaj a zazan nu pabatikar~…ĺan a zazan, pusku a ŇčajŇčaj pawap…ônan tu sakauzip tu ¶anan ¶anan a tuudan, pusk…ô a jin ¶umin piazińßan pipa ¶akajan, i-san kanatar~…ĺ a aidaŇčan nanan kasaupuan nu miidaŇčaj a r~…ĺabaŇč, pa-tuŇč-kuwn kasumamadan a zazan pikajakajan a zazan r~…ĺabuaj mikir~…ĺim tu kar~…ĺijuńßan, ¶…ô-k…ô a buju Ē~ ° ¶in ¶…ôn a bar~…ĺu sar~…ĺuŇčan azińß…ôn, siw-ku-r~…ĺan a sauwa ¶ mikinaur~…ĺ tu tar~…ĺastas a ajam atu nuwar~…ĺian mur~…ĺikataj a ba Ē~ °tu miazińß u sia ¶aaj aidaŇčan.
